results.title: Democrats Can’t Just Go Back to Biden on Immigration
results.description: Highlighting Trump’s excesses isn’t enough. For 2028, Democrats need a credible plan to control the border and a clearer path to citizenship.

results.title: President Trump's Actions Spark Comparison to Monarchy
results.description: President Donald Trump's actions since returning to power have led to comparisons of an imperial reign, with some even comparing him to King George III, the British monarch whose rule inspired the American Revolution. Trump's actions include nominating his personal lawyer as attorney general, deploying the US Marines, and leveraging the presidency to enrich himself and his family.

results.title: Yazidi Girl's Ordeal: From ISIS Captivity to Gaza Slavery
results.description: Fawzia Amin Sido, abducted by ISIS at age nine, endured a decade of sexual slavery, torture, and forced labor across multiple countries. After being trafficked through Syria, Turkey, and Egypt, she was held as a domestic slave in Gaza by her captor's family, suffering severe psychological abuse and attempts on her life. Her story highlights ongoing trauma for Yazidi survivors and exploitation in conflict zones.

results.title: JD Vance warned Iran that 'violence will be met with violence'
results.description: The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps claimed responsibility for missile strikes targeting Kuwait and Bahrain on Sunday. The UKMTO also reported multiple strikes on trade vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.
